downloadTitle: Sybase ASE Mixed Collation Scan Utility
downloadDescription: Scans char and varchar columns across all databases on a server for mixed collation and invalid characters
detailsSection: Sybase ASE servers configured with iso_1 (ISO 8859-1) treat bytes store in char/varchar columns as single-byte characters which can be abused to store multi-byte encoded data (UTF-8, Shift-JIS) as raw bytes. When this data is migrated to SQL Server it can cause conversion failures or silent data corruption. This tool identifies those columns before migration.
installInstructionSection: Download the .zip and extract the files. Update the appsettings.json or use parameters.
